0.q: SOS3, SOS2, and SOS1 were significantly induced in FtbZIP12-overexpressing lines... suggesting that FtbZIP12 can activate the SOS pathway

1.q: FtbZIP12 may improve Tartary buckwheat stress resistance by regulating related downstream stress genes, the SOS pathway gene, and the P5CS1-driven proline synthesis pathway.

18.q: FtMYB22, as a negative regulator, inhibited a variety of physiological and biochemical reactions, affected gene expression and stomatal closure in transgenic plants through the ABA-dependent pathway.

19.q: FtbZIP5, as a positive regulator, mediates plant tolerance to salt and drought through ABA-dependent signaling pathways.
